verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All creation cries to you Worshipping in spirit and in truth Glory to the faithful one Jesus Christ God's son

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All creation gives you praise You alone are truly great You alone are god who reigns for eternity

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God is great and His praise fills the earth fills the heavens Your name will be praise through all the world God is great sing his praise all the earth all the heavens 'Cause were living for the glory of your name The glory of your name

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: All to you oh god we bring jesus teach us how to live Let your fire burn in us that all may hear and all may see

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: Holy is the lord The whole earth sings The whole earth sings :/ x4
